sectionSubtitle: Scroll through and take a tour of the villas, room by room

exterior-summer.title: This is where your story begins
exterior-summer.subtitle: Villa 1 · Villa 2 · Villa Deluxe
exterior-summer.description: Three private villas, nestled among the pine trees of Raykovski Livadi. You’ll have the entire villa all to yourself—no neighbors right next door, and no compromises on comfort. Choose the one you like, and leave the rest to us.
exterior-summer.imageAlt: Exterior of the villa in the summer

exterior-winter.title: When the snow falls
exterior-winter.subtitle: Skiing in the morning, a fire in the fireplace in the evening
exterior-winter.description: In the morning, you’re on the slopes in minutes, and in the evening, the warmth of the fireplace and the aroma of a barbecue await you. The snow reaches right up to your doorstep—and all you need is a glass of mulled wine and good company.
exterior-winter.imageAlt: A Villa Under the Snow in Pamporovo

living-fireplace.title: Where the family gathers
living-fireplace.subtitle: Large living room with a fireplace
living-fireplace.description: A spacious living room with a real wood-burning fireplace, where wood and stone create a warm, homey atmosphere. This is where people play board games, tell stories, and tend the fire—the heart of every evening.
living-fireplace.imageAlt: Living room with a fireplace and a dining area

open-plan.title: Bright and spacious
open-plan.subtitle: Kitchen · Dining Room · Living Room
open-plan.description: The kitchen, dining room, and living room are all part of one open space—so you can be together even when one person is cooking and the others are relaxing. The large windows let the mountain light stream in.
open-plan.imageAlt: Open-concept layout — view from the staircase

dining.title: A table around which everything happens
dining.subtitle: From morning coffee to a late dinner
dining.description: A large wooden table with room for the whole group and a view straight out at the pine trees. Here, the day begins with coffee in the soft light and ends with dinner, laughter, and plans for tomorrow.
dining.imageAlt: Dining room with a view of the pine forest

kitchen.title: Cook just like at home
kitchen.subtitle: Fully equipped kitchen
kitchen.description: A stovetop, oven, refrigerator, microwave, coffee maker, and a full set of dishes—everything you need for a home-cooked breakfast or a festive dinner. Because sometimes the most delicious meal is the one you cook yourself, up in the mountains.

bedrooms.title: A sleep like you haven't had in a long time
bedrooms.subtitle: Two cozy bedrooms
bedrooms.description: Two separate bedrooms with comfortable beds and high-quality bedding—accommodating up to 6 guests. The tranquility of the forest and the fresh air at 1,650 m work wonders; you’ll wake up feeling refreshed, we promise.
bedrooms.imageAlt: Hallway leading to the two bedrooms

bathroom.title: A bathroom with a mountain feel
bathroom.subtitle: Comfort for the whole group
bathroom.description: A fully equipped bathroom with hot water at all times—spacious and cozy for the whole group. Natural materials and a warm atmosphere.
bathroom.imageAlt: A bathroom with wood and tiles

terrace.title: The view that keeps you coming back
terrace.subtitle: The Rhodopes at a Glance
terrace.description: A terrace with a panoramic view of the Rhodope Mountains and the pine forests. Here, you can enjoy your first cup of coffee as the sun rises over the peaks and bid farewell to the day as the sun sets in a golden glow. Moments that linger long after your vacation is over.
terrace.imageAlt: A golden sunset over the Rhodopes

bbq-veranda.title: Evenings that seem to go on forever
bbq-veranda.subtitle: Covered porch with a barbecue
bbq-veranda.description: The covered patio with a barbecue is the perfect spot when the sun goes down. Grill, chat, and laugh outdoors—and if it starts to rain or gets chilly, you’ll stay dry and warm without losing that mountain vibe.
bbq-veranda.imageAlt: Veranda with a barbecue and a winter view
